title: Lesser Galam

'''Lesser Galam''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moonless]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]], the first from the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Lan (star)|Lan]] of the [[Lan system]], located inside the [[Hook Nebula/Legends|Hook Nebula]], within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. As with the worlds of the Lan system, except for [[Lan Barell/Legends|Lan Barell]], Lesser Galam was incapable of supporting life, having a scorched climate and a desolate, [[Water/Legends|waterless]] and [[rock]]y surface. Lesser Galam was extremely [[Ore/Legends|ore]]-rich, a fact which lead to its discovery by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], sometime around [[1300 BBY/Legends|1300 BBY]]. Soon after, the [[Gaminne Group, Inc.]]—a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] conglomerate—purchased the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] mining rights from [[Lan Barell/Legends|Lan Barell's]] native [[Species/Legends|species]], the [[Qieg/Legends|Qieg]], and started exploring the mineral resources, shipping ore to many resource-poor systems. The Qieg and the Human colonists would in time form a stable government, the [[Human-Qieg Guild]], administrating over the entire system. The system would eventually become part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Realspace/Legends|space]], although the Empire didn't have official presence there.<ref name="LB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lesser Galam first and only mention, thus far, was in the article "[[Lan Barell (article)|Lan Barell]]," written by [[Paul Sudlow]] and published within the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 1]] in [[1994]].
